full_text:
Ji Pi 吉㔻
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Pi (吉㔻)was born in Zuopingyi. Court physician from Luoyang. Forced to commit suicide by Cao Cao. Ji Pi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ji Pi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
